parameters.query:
-- 1. Upsert Channel (Dimensão)
WITH dim AS (
  INSERT INTO dim_channels (name) VALUES ($1) 
  ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET active = true 
  RETURNING id
)
-- 2. Insert/Update Daily Fact
INSERT INTO fact_daily_marketing (date, channel_id, cost, leads, impressions, clicks)
SELECT $2::date, id, $3, $4, $5, $6 FROM dim
ON CONFLICT (date, channel_id, product_id) 
DO UPDATE SET cost = EXCLUDED.cost, leads = EXCLUDED.leads;

-- 1. Upsert Team Member (Dimensão)
WITH dim AS (
  INSERT INTO dim_team (name, role, email) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) 
  ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET active = true 
  RETURNING id
)
-- 2. Insert/Update Team Activity Fact
INSERT INTO fact_team_activities (date, team_member_id, connections, calls, meetings_booked)
SELECT $4::date, id, $5, $6, $7 FROM dim
ON CONFLICT (date, team_member_id) 
DO UPDATE SET connections = EXCLUDED.connections;

parameters.content:
## Workflow V2 (Star Schema)

Este template popula as tabelas Fato e Dimensão.

1. **Upsert Dimensão**: Garante que o Canal/Pessoa exista.
2. **Insert Fato**: Grava o dado do dia.

Isso garante histórico e integridade.
